name: Braulo
key_features: Rage (+4 melee damage, resistance to B/P/S, advantage on STR checks/saves)
Frenzy (bonus action melee attack while raging)
Retaliation (reaction: melee attack when damaged by adjacent creature)
Intimidating Presence (frighten creature within 30 ft, WIS DC 15)
Shell Defense (action: +4 AC, advantage on STR/CON saves, prone, speed 0)
Brutal Critical (3 extra damage dice on crit)
Persistent Rage (rage only ends early if unconscious or you choose to)
notable_equipment: Nu' Shipwrecker (melee, 1d8/1d10+7, reach extended to 10 ft)
party_role_guess: Tank / Melee DPS (highest HP in party, massive STR/CON, berserker)
